title: OSF Sync descriptor — next/ (AC-1 coverage: sync alongside profiles + sources)
description: Permissive AJV meta-schema for files under next/sync/**. AC-1 requires the next/ pipeline to cover profiles AND sources/sync. next/sync/ is currently empty (the live sync descriptors live under the canonical sync/), so this schema is intentionally CONSERVATIVE/PERMISSIVE and forward-looking: it pins only the minimal spine (a 'version' + an identifier) and leaves every transport-specific block (nats/mqtt/kafka/polling/webhook/manual/bridge …) open ('additionalProperties': true). It is modelled on the canonical sync/** shapes, which themselves vary widely (some carry 'syncId', some only 'mappingId', some have no 'syncType' at all). Identifier rule: at least one of syncId / mappingId. When a next/sync descriptor IS added it MUST validate here without forcing a particular transport schema — coverage, not enforcement. Deeper per-syncType semantics are reviewed, not schema-pinned (same loose-facet pattern as the profile isa95 block).

sources.description: Polling-style sync: the source descriptors this sync drives. Loosely typed; sourceRef wires to a next/sources entry.
